title: Maybe
description: Open-source personal finance and wealth management app to track accounts, budgets, investments and net worth.
installation: Rails app requiring PostgreSQL and Redis (deployed as add-ons). Rotate SECRET_KEY_BASE to a unique value (openssl rand -hex 64) and rotate the postgres password before exposing publicly. A separate Sidekiq worker process (same image, command: bundle exec sidekiq) should be deployed for background jobs; the web container will function for basic use without it but recurring syncs/imports need the worker. Set SELF_HOSTING_ENABLED=true. If serving over plain HTTP behind the ingress's own TLS, RAILS_FORCE_SSL/RAILS_ASSUME_SSL are left false; enable them if terminating TLS at the app.
